creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get a dependency build failure in the process:

===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/openjdk7/bin/java - found
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: stage          >============================
===>  Staging for subsonic-jetty-5.0
===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/share/java/classes/servlet-api.jar - found
===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/alsa-lib/libasound_module_pcm_oss.so - found
===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/jetty/start.jar - found
===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on executable: ffmpeg - found
===>   subsonic-jetty-5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/openjdk7/bin/java - found
** Missing /usr/ports/www/subsonic/files/message-common.in for subsonic-jetty-5.0.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/subsonic
